PRD-Lite：统一导出平台\r\n\r\n\u003e 仓库正式入口真相源之一。本文将归档中的后端统一导出需求收敛为本仓库的统一产品口径，默认面向后端平台能力，不引入前端页面设计。\r\n\r\n## 1. 基本信息\r\n\r\n- Feature ID: `FEAT-EXPORT-PLATFORM-001`\r\n- Feature 名称: 统一导出平台\r\n- 当前状态: `Review`\r\n- 最后更新: `2026-05-12`\r\n\r\n## 2. 目标\r\n\r\n- 统一采购、销售、物流、仓储等子系统的导出任务入口。\r\n- 导出从同步下载改为异步任务，避免长请求超时。\r\n- 平台统一负责任务、调度、操作权限、查询执行、字段映射、脱敏、文件渲染、下载保护、审计、清理和导出结果校验。\r\n- 子系统只负责提交导出任务、传递认证上下文和符合注册 schema 的业务查询参数。\r\n\r\n## 3. 默认决策\r\n\r\n- 平台以独立微服务形态交付，子系统独立部署。\r\n- 平台不提供登录认证能力，但必须消费子系统或网关透传的认证上下文，并负责任务可见性、操作权限和下载权限校验。\r\n- 子系统接入方式采用 `HTTP/Feign` 调用平台任务接口。\r\n- 平台通过注册配置访问业务只读数据源或数据中台，不直接依赖业务子系统 JAR，不使用业务库写账号。\r\n- 注册配置契约包含数据源编码、参数 schema、参数化查询模板、字段映射、脱敏策略、数据范围约束、游标字段、排序规则、批大小、行数阈值、保留期和支持格式。\r\n- 调度方式采用 `MySQL 轮询 + DB 抢锁`。\r\n- 下载方式默认采用 `签名 URL`，同时支持 `stream`。\r\n- 一期支持 `XLSX` 和超过单文件阈值后的 `ZIP`。\r\n- 一期不支持 `Word / PDF / CUSTOM`；后续如需支持，优先在平台侧建设模板和渲染能力。\r\n- 空数据导出生成仅表头文件，任务仍然完成。\r\n- 一期不做审批。\r\n- 平台正式对外任务状态限定为 `PENDING`、`EXECUTING`、`COMPLETED`、`FAILED`、`CANCELED`、`EXPIRED`。\r\n- 历史任务查询正式筛选维度为 `taskCode`、`status`、`createdBy`、`createdAtRange`、`fileFormat`、`subsystemCode`；普通用户默认只能看本人任务，管理员可按权限查看全局。\r\n- 注册与配置能力覆盖注册创建/更新/查询、启停、并发上限、保留期、单文件行数阈值、最大导出量和支持格式策略。\r\n- 下载响应必须显式表达交付方式：签名 URL 返回 `downloadUrl`、`expiresAt`、`fileName`、`fileSize`，流式下载返回文件流和等价文件元信息。\r\n- 统一认证上下文最小字段为 `operatorId`、`tenantId`、`roleCodes`、`orgScope`、`requestId`；平台按认证上下文执行任务可见性、操作权限、下载权限和查询数据范围约束，子系统只传上下文。\r\n- 对象存储文件路径默认按 `exports/{subsystemCode}/{taskCode}/{yyyyMMdd}/{taskId}/{attemptNo}/{fileName}` 组织；签名 URL 默认有效期为 10 分钟；文件校验值默认使用 `SHA-256`。\r\n- 创建任务接口支持 `clientRequestId` 幂等键，幂等范围为 `tenantId + operatorId + taskCode + clientRequestId`。\r\n- 任务创建时固化注册配置快照和执行参数摘要；后续执行、取消、重试、下载和审计均引用同一任务快照。\r\n- 执行尝试统一使用 `attemptNo` 标识；每次失败重试递增 `attemptNo`，同一任务同一时刻只允许一个活跃执行尝试。\r\n- DB 抢锁默认使用 `lockOwner + lockExpireAt` 租约模型；默认租约 5 分钟，worker 在批次边界续租，租约过期后可由其他实例重新抢锁。\r\n- 锁租约过期后的实例接管延续当前 `attemptNo`，并记录接管审计；只有用户或系统发起 FAILED 重试时才递增 `attemptNo`。\r\n- 大数据查询默认使用稳定游标分页，不以 offset 分页作为主路径；游标字段必须来自注册配置。\r\n- 创建请求 `queryParams` 默认最大 32KB；单文件默认最大 20000 行；单任务默认最大导出量 100000 行，具体可由注册配置收紧。\r\n- 查询执行必须叠加 `tenantId`、`operatorId`、`roleCodes`、`orgScope` 对应的数据范围约束。\r\n- 平台只允许访问注册配置声明的只读数据源或数据中台。\r\n- 查询模板必须参数化，并且只能绑定参数 schema 允许的字段。\r\n- 平台不得执行调用方传入的原始 SQL。\r\n- 平台执行链路必须持久化阶段事件，阶段至少包括 `QUERY_READY`、`QUERY_BATCH_DONE`、`FILE_PART_WRITTEN`、`PACKAGE_DONE`、`FILE_VERIFIED`、`DELIVERY_READY`。\r\n- 文件生成采用“先写临时对象、校验通过后发布”的交付模型；未发布对象不得被下载接口返回。\r\n- 采购订单导出作为一期样板模块，覆盖查询条件、字段表头、游标分页、敏感字段、空数据、分片、权限、审计、下载和 10 万行压测证据。\r\n\r\n## 4. 范围\r\n\r\n### In Scope\r\n\r\n- 创建导出任务、查询进度、查询历史、下载文件、取消、重试。\r\n- 导出任务注册、子系统并发控制、文件过期清理。\r\n- XLSX/ZIP 主路径。\r\n- 一期不支持 Word/PDF/CUSTOM。\r\n- 平台消费认证上下文、操作权限、任务可见性、下载签名保护、审计日志和导出结果脱敏校验。\r\n- 平台集中查询、字段映射、脱敏和渲染能力。\r\n\r\n### Out of Scope\r\n\r\n- 新前端页面、弹窗、任务中心 UI。\r\n- 一期审批流。\r\n- 一期全量接入所有子系统。\r\n- 把子系统导出实现类直接打包进平台服务进程。\r\n\r\n## 5. 关键需求\r\n\r\n| 需求 ID | 需求描述 | 优先级 |\r\n| --- | --- | --- |\r\n| FR-001 | 创建导出任务并立即返回 `taskId` | P0 |\r\n| FR-002 | 查询任务进度和状态 | P0 |\r\n| FR-003 | 下载导出文件，支持签名 URL 或流式下载 | P0 |\r\n| FR-004 | 查询任务历史 | P0 |\r\n| FR-005 | 按子系统限制并发并调度执行 | P0 |\r\n| FR-006 | 大数据量导出自动分片并打包 | P0 |\r\n| FR-007 | 注册导出任务并启停 | P0 |\r\n| FR-008 | 提供集中查询模板、数据源、字段映射和脱敏策略契约 | P0 |\r\n| FR-009 | 权限校验、字段脱敏、下载签名 | P0 |\r\n| FR-010 | 记录任务日志、下载日志、失败原因 | P0 |\r\n| FR-011 | 文件过期清理 | P1 |\r\n| FR-012 | 取消和重试任务 | P1 |\r\n| FR-013 | 创建幂等、执行尝试、DB 锁租约和任务配置快照 | P0 |\r\n| FR-014 | 采购订单导出样板形成集中查询可执行合同 | P0 |\r\n\r\n## 6. 业务规则\r\n\r\n- 仅允许已注册且启用的 `taskCode` 创建任务。\r\n- 创建任务前必须通过平台操作权限校验。\r\n- 下载前必须再次校验权限和文件有效期。\r\n- 单文件默认最大 `20000` 行。\r\n- 单任务默认最大导出量 `100000` 行。\r\n- 文件默认保留 `15` 天，任务历史默认保留 `30` 天。\r\n- PENDING 可取消；FAILED 可重试；COMPLETED、CANCELED、EXPIRED 不允许直接重试为同一任务。\r\n- FAILED 任务重试必须保留原 `taskId` 的审计链路并递增执行尝试次数；同一任务同一时刻只能有一个活跃执行尝试。\r\n- PENDING/EXECUTING 任务收到重试请求时返回非法状态错误，且不得重复派发执行。\r\n- EXECUTING 取消采用批次边界收口：平台记录取消意图，worker 在批次边界停止并最终置为 `CANCELED`。\r\n- 平台只允许访问注册配置声明的只读数据源或数据中台数据集。\r\n- 查询模板必须参数化，并且只能绑定参数 schema 允许的字段。\r\n- 平台不得执行调用方传入的原始 SQL。\r\n- 平台执行查询时必须叠加 `tenantId`、`operatorId`、`roleCodes`、`orgScope` 对应的数据范围约束。\r\n- 字段定义必须包含字段编码、表头、类型、顺序、是否敏感、是否导出和脱敏策略。\r\n- 平台不得导出未在字段映射中声明为可导出的字段。\r\n- 每个查询批次写入文件片段前必须完成字段白名单、字段顺序和敏感字段脱敏结果校验。\r\n- 查询模板、字段映射或脱敏策略与任务快照冲突时，必须按配置错误或字段映射错误收口，不得静默放宽字段范围或行数阈值。\r\n- 调用方提供 `clientRequestId` 时，相同幂等范围和相同参数摘要必须返回原 `taskId`；相同幂等范围但参数摘要不同必须返回 `IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT`。\r\n- 审计日志至少记录 `taskId`、`taskCode`、`subsystemCode`、`operatorId`、`action`、`result`、`errorCode`、`requestId` 和发生时间。\r\n- 审计动作至少覆盖 `CREATE`、`DISPATCH`、`EXECUTE_START`、`EXECUTE_SUCCESS`、`EXECUTE_FAILED`、`CANCEL_REQUEST`、`CANCEL_DONE`、`RETRY_REQUEST`、`DOWNLOAD`、`EXPIRE_MARK`、`CLEANUP_FAILED`。\r\n- 文件过期清理先标记任务或文件引用为不可下载，再删除对象存储文件；清理失败必须保留可重试记录。\r\n- 平台生成文件后必须记录 `fileName`、`fileSize`、`contentType`、`storageKey`、`checksum`、`checksumAlgorithm`、`expiresAt` 和 `attemptNo`。\r\n- DB 锁的时间判断以数据库时间为准，避免多实例机器时钟漂移影响抢锁和租约过期判断。\r\n- 执行尝试输出必须按 `attemptNo` 隔离存储，新的成功尝试不得覆盖历史失败尝试的审计证据。\r\n- 锁接管必须从已持久化的批次检查点继续，批次检查点至少包含 `lastCursor`、`processedCount`、`filePartNo` 和当前 `attemptNo`。\r\n- Worker 只能在批次边界响应执行中取消；已写入文件片段必须进入当前 `attemptNo` 的失败或取消处置链路。\r\n- 文件发布前必须校验文件元信息和内容校验值；校验失败时不得生成下载地址，任务进入失败处置并保留临时对象定位或清理记录。\r\n- 采购订单样板默认查询条件包括创建时间范围、订单状态、供应商、采购组织和关键词；默认游标字段为稳定递增的 `orderId` 或等价唯一排序键。\r\n- 采购订单样板默认 `taskCode` 为 `purchase-order-export`，`subsystemCode` 为 `purchase`，默认支持 `XLSX` 和超过单文件阈值后的 `ZIP` 打包。\r\n- 采购订单样板字段顺序固定为订单号、订单状态、供应商、采购组织、采购员、创建时间、总金额、币种、联系人姓名、联系人手机号；联系人姓名和联系人手机号必须标记为敏感字段并由平台按注册脱敏策略执行并校验。\r\n- 采购订单样板查询批次结果必须按 `orderId` 或等价唯一排序键稳定递增，禁止使用非稳定排序导致锁接管或重试后重复/漏导。\r\n- 采购订单样板测试数据必须覆盖 `0/1/20000/20001/100000/100001` 行边界；`100001` 行在默认配置下应触发超过最大导出量处置。\r\n- 采购订单样板验收证据必须能串联创建请求、集中查询执行、批次检查点、分片文件、ZIP 文件、审计日志、下载记录和 10 万行压测记录。\r\n\r\n## 7. 风险与假设\r\n\r\n- 只读数据源或数据中台性能决定导出吞吐。\r\n- 查询模板治理不当可能导致 SQL 注入、越权查询或高成本查询。\r\n- 多实例重复执行必须靠 DB 原子抢锁避免。\r\n- 需要统一认证上下文、角色编码、组织/数据范围字段。\r\n- 微服务环境下需要锁定请求头透传、数据源凭证、查询超时、批次重试和模板版本管理策略。\r\n- 执行阶段失败统一映射到 `FAILED` 和明确错误码，例如 `QUERY_TEMPLATE_INVALID`、`DATASOURCE_UNAVAILABLE`、`QUERY_EXECUTION_ERROR`、`FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID`、`MASKING_RULE_ERROR`、`EXPORT_RENDER_ERROR`。\r\n- 对象存储 bucket 名称由环境配置决定，但 path、签名有效期默认值和校验算法必须符合本文件默认决策；如需调整，只能通过注册/配置或环境配置覆盖，并保留审计证据。\r\n- 过期锁重抢可能造成重复批次风险，因此文件写入、对象存储路径和审计记录必须以 `attemptNo` 和批次边界隔离。\r\n- 查询模板版本和参数 schema 变更会影响执行口径，10 万行压测证据必须记录批大小、重试次数、锁续租次数和总耗时。\r\n\r\n## # Stage 2 Review Prompt 模板

你是 Stage 2 Reviewer。Stage 1 已通过。现在只审查**代码质量、测试、风险和可维护性**，不要重新做需求裁判。

## 当前任务

- Task ID: `<task-id>`
- 描述: `<task-description>`
- 测试命令: `<test-command>`

## 必查项

1. 类型是否正确，是否有明显不安全或逃逸类型。
2. 命名、模块边界、职责分离是否清晰。
3. 是否有无关文件、临时代码、调试输出、硬编码密钥。
4. 改动代码是否有对应测试、契约验证或证据路径；如果没有，是否给出可信豁免。
5. 测试是否覆盖关键行为、异常流、权限路径和历史回归路径。
6. 是否存在“只 mock 不验证结果”“只测 happy path”“跳过失败测试”或其它假测试迹象。
7. 是否存在明显性能、可访问性或回归风险。
8. 验证结果是否可信，是否缺少 affected tests、契约检查或 fresh evidence。
9. 如果任务声明了 `architecture_constraints` 或 `forbidden_implementations`，测试是否覆盖对应架构约束；例如生产入口、真实 repository、handler、worker、migration 或禁止使用测试替身。
10. 如果本次修复了历史坑或形成了可复用经验，是否在最终报告中给出 `knowledge_outputs` 建议，供 `ARCHIVE-*` 任务归档。
11. 如果代码或文档决策依赖 `docs/knowledge/`，是否给出 `knowledge_references`，避免知识只存在于会话上下文。

## Finding 规则

每个问题都必须带 `finding_id`，格式建议为 `<task-id>-S2-F001`。每个 finding 必须包含：

- severity: `HIGH` / `MEDIUM` / `LOW`
- category: `type_safety` / `test_gap` / `architecture_test_gap` / `security` / `performance` / `maintainability` / `artifact_gap` / `environment` / `knowledge_gap`
- owner: `frontend` / `backend` / `test` / `security` / `docs` / `controller`
- evidence: 文件路径、测试输出、日志路径或命令结果
- recommended_fix: 下一轮 repair worker 可直接执行的修复建议
- retest_command: 推荐复验命令

## 输出格式

```markdown
## Stage 2 Findings

| Finding ID | Severity | Category | Owner | Evidence | Recommended Fix | Retest |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

## Verification

- 已检查命令:
- 结果摘要:

## Verdict

- PASS
- FAIL

## Repair Queue

| Finding ID | Owner | Suggested Worker Role | Retry Budget | Blocking |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
```

规则:

- `HIGH` 问题存在时必须 `FAIL`。
- 如果测试覆盖明显不足，也可以直接 `FAIL`。
- 允许提出 `LOW` 级建议，但不要把风格偏好伪装成阻塞问题。
- 如果 `Verdict: FAIL`，`Repair Queue` 不能为空。

---
name: using-superpowers
description: Use when starting any conversation - establishes how to find and use skills, requiring Skill tool invocation before ANY response including clarifying questions
---

<SUBAGENT-STOP>
If you were dispatched as a subagent to execute a specific task, skip this skill.
</SUBAGENT-STOP>

<EXTREMELY-IMPORTANT>
If you think there is even a 1% chance a skill might apply to what you are doing, you ABSOLUTELY MUST invoke the skill.

IF A SKILL APPLIES TO YOUR TASK, YOU DO NOT HAVE A CHOICE. YOU MUST USE IT.

This is not negotiable. This is not optional. You cannot rationalize your way out of this.
</EXTREMELY-IMPORTANT>

## Instruction Priority

Superpowers skills override default system prompt behavior, but **user instructions always take precedence**:

1. **User's explicit instructions** (CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, AGENTS.md, direct requests) — highest priority
2. **Superpowers skills** — override default system behavior where they conflict
3. **Default system prompt** — lowest priority

If CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, or AGENTS.md says "don't use TDD" and a skill says "always use TDD," follow the user's instructions. The user is in control.

## How to Access Skills

**In Claude Code:** Use the `Skill` tool. When you invoke a skill, its content is loaded and presented to you—follow it directly. Never use the Read tool on skill files.

**In Copilot CLI:** Use the `skill` tool. Skills are auto-discovered from installed plugins. The `skill` tool works the same as Claude Code's `Skill` tool.

**In Gemini CLI:** Skills activate via the `activate_skill` tool. Gemini loads skill metadata at session start and activates the full content on demand.

**In other environments:** Check your platform's documentation for how skills are loaded.

## Platform Adaptation

Skills use Claude Code tool names. Non-CC platforms: see `references/copilot-tools.md` (Copilot CLI), `references/codex-tools.md` (Codex) for tool equivalents. Gemini CLI users get the tool mapping loaded automatically via GEMINI.md.

# Using Skills

## The Rule

**Invoke relevant or requested skills BEFORE any response or action.** Even a 1% chance a skill might apply means that you should invoke the skill to check. If an invoked skill turns out to be wrong for the situation, you don't need to use it.

```dot
digraph skill_flow {
    "User message received" [shape=doublecircle];
    "About to EnterPlanMode?" [shape=doublecircle];
    "Already brainstormed?" [shape=diamond];
    "Invoke brainstorming skill" [shape=box];
    "Might any skill apply?" [shape=diamond];
    "Invoke Skill tool" [shape=box];
    "Announce: 'Using [skill] to [purpose]'" [shape=box];
    "Has checklist?" [shape=diamond];
    "Create TodoWrite todo per item" [shape=box];
    "Follow skill exactly" [shape=box];
    "Respond (including clarifications)" [shape=doublecircle];

    "About to EnterPlanMode?" -> "Already brainstormed?";
    "Already brainstormed?" -> "Invoke brainstorming skill" [label="no"];
    "Already brainstormed?" -> "Might any skill apply?" [label="yes"];
    "Invoke brainstorming skill" -> "Might any skill apply?";

    "User message received" -> "Might any skill apply?";
    "Might any skill apply?" -> "Invoke Skill tool" [label="yes, even 1%"];
    "Might any skill apply?" -> "Respond (including clarifications)" [label="definitely not"];
    "Invoke Skill tool" -> "Announce: 'Using [skill] to [purpose]'";
    "Announce: 'Using [skill] to [purpose]'" -> "Has checklist?";
    "Has checklist?" -> "Create TodoWrite todo per item" [label="yes"];
    "Has checklist?" -> "Follow skill exactly" [label="no"];
    "Create TodoWrite todo per item" -> "Follow skill exactly";
}
```

## Red Flags

These thoughts mean STOP—you're rationalizing:

| Thought | Reality |
|---------|---------|
| "This is just a simple question" | Questions are tasks. Check for skills. |
| "I need more context first" | Skill check comes BEFORE clarifying questions. |
| "Let me explore the codebase first" | Skills tell you HOW to explore. Check first. |
| "I can check git/files quickly" | Files lack conversation context. Check for skills. |
| "Let me gather information first" | Skills tell you HOW to gather information. |
| "This doesn't need a formal skill" | If a skill exists, use it. |
| "I remember this skill" | Skills evolve. Read current version. |
| "This doesn't count as a task" | Action = task. Check for skills. |
| "The skill is overkill" | Simple things become complex. Use it. |
| "I'll just do this one thing first" | Check BEFORE doing anything. |
| "This feels productive" | Undisciplined action wastes time. Skills prevent this. |
| "I know what that means" | Knowing the concept ≠ using the skill. Invoke it. |

## Skill Priority

When multiple skills could apply, use this order:

1. **Process skills first** (brainstorming, debugging) - these determine HOW to approach the task
2. **Implementation skills second** (frontend-design, mcp-builder) - these guide execution

"Let's build X" → brainstorming first, then implementation skills.
"Fix this bug" → debugging first, then domain-specific skills.

## Skill Types

**Rigid** (TDD, debugging): Follow exactly. Don't adapt away discipline.

**Flexible** (patterns): Adapt principles to context.

The skill itself tells you which.

## User Instructions

Instructions say WHAT, not HOW. "Add X" or "Fix Y" doesn't mean skip workflows.

---
name: code-review
description: Code Review Skill
---

# Code Review Skill

代码审查清单和 PR 规范。

## PR 提交规范

### PR 标题格式
```
<type>(<scope>): <description>

示例:
feat(auth): 添加 OAuth2.0 登录功能
fix(api): 修复用户列表分页问题
refactor(db): 优化查询性能
```

### PR 描述模板
```markdown
## 变更说明
简要描述本次变更的内容和目的

## 变更类型
- [ ] 新功能
- [ ] Bug 修复
- [ ] 重构
- [ ] 性能优化
- [ ] 文档更新

## 关联 Issue
Closes #123

## 测试说明
- [ ] 单元测试通过
- [ ] 集成测试通过
- [ ] 手动测试通过

## 截图（如适用）
UI 变更请附截图

## 检查清单
- [ ] 代码符合项目规范
- [ ] 已添加必要的测试
- [ ] 已更新相关文档
- [ ] 无敏感信息泄露
```

## 代码审查清单

### 功能正确性
- [ ] 代码实现了预期功能
- [ ] 边界条件处理正确
- [ ] 错误处理完善
- [ ] 无明显的逻辑漏洞

### 代码质量
- [ ] 命名清晰有意义
- [ ] 函数职责单一
- [ ] 无重复代码
- [ ] 复杂逻辑有注释
- [ ] 无硬编码的魔法数字

### 安全性
- [ ] 输入验证完整
- [ ] 无 SQL 注入风险
- [ ] 无 XSS 风险
- [ ] 敏感信息已脱敏
- [ ] 权限检查到位

### 性能
- [ ] 无 N+1 查询
- [ ] 无不必要的循环
- [ ] 大数据量有分页
- [ ] 耗时操作有缓存或异步

### 可维护性
- [ ] 代码结构清晰
- [ ] 依赖关系合理
- [ ] 易于测试
- [ ] 易于扩展

## 审查反馈规范

### 评论分类
```
[必须] 必须修改才能合并
[建议] 建议修改，可讨论
[疑问] 需要解释或讨论
[赞] 写得好的地方
```

### 反馈示例
```
[必须] 这里存在 SQL 注入风险，请使用参数化查询

[建议] 这个函数超过 50 行，建议拆分为更小的函数

[疑问] 为什么这里用 setTimeout 而不是 debounce？

[赞] 这个抽象设计得很好，复用性强
```

## 审查流程

```
┌─────────────┐
│  提交 PR    │
└──────┬──────┘
       ▼
┌─────────────┐
│  CI 检查    │ ← 自动化测试、lint、构建
└──────┬──────┘
       ▼
┌─────────────┐
│  代码审查   │ ← 至少 1 人 approve
└──────┬──────┘
       ▼
┌─────────────┐
│  修改反馈   │ ← 根据评论修改
└──────┬──────┘
       ▼
┌─────────────┐
│  合并代码   │ ← Squash merge
└─────────────┘
```

## 审查原则

### 审查者
- 及时响应（24小时内）
- 提供建设性反馈
- 尊重作者的设计决策
- 区分必须修改和建议修改

### 作者
- PR 尽量小（<400行）
- 提供充分的上下文
- 积极回应反馈
- 不要 defensive

## 自动化检查

```yaml
# GitHub Actions 示例
name: PR Check

on: [pull_request]

jobs:
  check:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Lint
        run: npm run lint
        
      - name: Type Check
        run: npm run type-check
        
      - name: Test
        run: npm run test
        
      - name: Build
        run: npm run build
```

FR-009 / FR-013 | 创建任务、最小认证上下文、`clientRequestId` 幂等、成功响应 `idempotencyScope`、`requestDigest`、`configSnapshotDigest` |\n| `/api/export/tasks` | `GET` | FR-004 / FR-009 / FR-010 | 正式筛选维度、普通用户仅本人、管理员按权限全局查询 |\n| `/api/export/tasks/{taskId}` | `GET` | FR-002 / FR-010 | 详情、进度、失败错误码、批次检查点和文件元信息 |\n| `/api/export/tasks/{taskId}/download` | `GET` | FR-003 / FR-009 / FR-010 | 签名 URL、stream 元信息、文件校验、过期与权限失败 |\n| `/api/export/tasks/{taskId}/cancel` | `POST` | FR-012 / FR-010 | PENDING 取消、EXECUTING 批次边界取消；不暴露内部取消状态 |\n| `/api/export/tasks/{taskId}/retry` | `POST` | FR-012 / FR-013 / FR-010 | 仅 FAILED 可重试，沿用 `taskId` 和配置快照，递增 `attemptNo` |\n| `/api/export/registries` | `POST` / `GET` | FR-007 / FR-008 / FR-009 | 注册创建、查询、并发、保留期、阈值、格式、查询模板和字段映射 |\n| `/api/export/registries/{taskCode}` | `GET` / `PUT` | FR-007 / FR-008 / FR-013 | 配置详情、更新与新任务快照口径 |\n| `/api/export/registries/{taskCode}/enable` | `POST` | FR-007 | 启用注册配置 |\n| `/api/export/registries/{taskCode}/disable` | `POST` | FR-007 | 禁用注册配置，创建阶段返回 `TASK_DISABLED` |\n\n## 3.4 对外状态和错误码\n\n对外任务状态只能使用 `PENDING`、`EXECUTING`、`COMPLETED`、`FAILED`、`CANCELED`、`EXPIRED`。执行中取消意图只能通过动作响应字段表达，不得作为任务状态返回。\n\n| 错误码 | 默认 HTTP 状态 | 场景 |\n| --- | --- | --- |\n| `VALIDATION_ERROR` | 400 | 参数校验失败 |\n| `AUTH_CONTEXT_MISSING` | 401 | 缺少 `operatorId`、`tenantId`、`roleCodes`、`orgScope` 或 `requestId` |\n| `PERMISSION_DENIED` | 403 | 创建、查询、下载或配置操作无权限 |\n| `TASK_NOT_FOUND` | 404 | 任务不存在或对当前用户不可见 |\n| `TASK_NOT_REGISTERED` | 404 | `taskCode` 未注册 |\n| `TASK_DISABLED` | 400 | `taskCode` 已禁用 |\n| `QUERY_PARAMS_TOO_LARGE` | 400 | `queryParams` 超过 32KB 默认限制 |\n| `IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT` | 409 | 相同幂等范围但参数摘要不同 |\n| `INVALID_TASK_STATE` | 400 | 当前状态不允许下载、取消或重试 |\n| `ACTIVE_ATTEMPT_CONFLICT` | 409 | 已存在活跃执行尝试 |\n| `FILE_EXPIRED` | 410 | 文件已过期或已标记不可下载 |\n| `FILE_NOT_READY` | 400 | 文件未发布或任务尚未完成 |\n| `FILE_VERIFY_ERROR` | 500 | OSS 上传、元信息或校验失败 |\n| `QUERY_TEMPLATE_INVALID` | 500 | 查询模板不存在、不合法或与快照冲突 |\n| `DATASOURCE_UNAVAILABLE` | 500 | 数据源或凭证不可用 |\n| `QUERY_EXECUTION_ERROR` | 500 | 查询执行失败、批次重试耗尽或游标异常 |\n| `FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID` | 500 | 字段映射、字段顺序或字段白名单不合法 |\n| `MASKING_RULE_ERROR` | 500 | 脱敏策略配置或执行失败 |\n| `EXPORT_RENDER_ERROR` | 500 | XLSX/ZIP 渲染失败 |\n| `EXPORT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED` | 400 | 超过默认或配置化最大导出量 |\n| `REGISTRY_CONFLICT` | 409 | 注册 `taskCode` 冲突 |\n| `INTERNAL_ERROR` | 500 | 未分类服务端错误 |\n\n## 3.5 CONTRACT-REVIEW-001 生产边界追踪要求\n\n`contracts/openapi.yaml` 通过 4. 契约编写规则\n\n1. `openapi.yaml` 只放对外 API 的正式入口和状态/错误码锚点。\n2. 分区目录里的契约文件按能力拆分，不把所有场景塞进单个大文件。\n3. 每个契约必须能回指到至少一个 Requirement ID 和一个验收入口。\n4. API 契约、scheduler 契约、query 契约、file 契约、audit 契约和 sample 契约必须保持同一组术语，尤其是 `attemptNo`、`configSnapshotDigest`、`batchCheckpoint`、`storageKey`、`requestId`。\n5. 文件发布契约必须明确临时对象和已发布对象的边界，避免下载接口误暴露未发布对象。\n6. query 契约必须明确禁止原始 SQL，只允许参数化模板和参数 schema 绑定。\n7. scheduler 契约必须明确数据库时间、锁租约和接管规则，不允许依赖本机时间。\n\n## 5. 文件命名建议\n\n| 类型 | 命名建议 | 示例 |\n| --- | --- | --- |\n| API 契约 | `*.openapi.yaml` 或 `*.md` | `contracts/api/export-tasks.openapi.yaml` |\n| Scheduler 契约 | `*.md` | `contracts/scheduler/lease-and-lock.md` |\n| Query 契约 | `*.md` 或 `*.schema.json` | `contracts/query/template-and-mapping.md` |\n| File 契约 | `*.md` | `contracts/file/publish-and-download.md` |\n| Audit 契约 | `*.md` | `contracts/audit/task-events.md` |\n| Sample 契约 | `*.md` | `contracts/sample/purchase-order-export.md` |\n\n## 6. 使用顺序\n\n1. 先补 `contracts/openapi.yaml`，锚定对外 API。\n2. 再按 `api/`、`scheduler/`、`query/`、`file/`、`audit/`、`sample/` 分区补齐契约说明。\n3. 契约定稿后，测试目录按同名能力分区创建，保证测试层和契约层可一一对应。\n\n## 6.1 验证入口\n\n当前任务的最小验证命令为：\n\n```powershell\ngit diff --check -- contracts docs/testing/verify-matrix.md\nnpx --yes @redocly/cli@1.34.5 lint contracts/openapi.yaml\n```\n\n后续创建 Node 或契约测试工程后，应把 OpenAPI 校验固化为 package script，例如：\n\n```powershell\npowershell -NoProfile -Command \"npm run test:contract\"\n```\n\n## 7. 约束\n\n- 不在 `contracts/` 里写实现代码。\n- 不用 `contracts/` 替代 `docs/testing/` 的追溯矩阵和验证矩阵。\n- Watch it fail. Write minimal code to pass.\r\n\r\n**Core principle:** If you didn\u0027t watch the test fail, you don\u0027t know if it tests the right thing.\r\n\r\n**Violating the letter of the rules is violating the spirit of the rules.**\r\n\r\n## When to Use\r\n\r\n**Always:**\r\n- New features\r\n- Bug fixes\r\n- Refactoring\r\n- Behavior changes\r\n\r\n**Exceptions (ask your human partner):**\r\n- Throwaway prototypes\r\n- Generated code\r\n- Configuration files\r\n\r\nThinking \"skip TDD just this once\"? Stop. That\u0027s rationalization.\r\n\r\n## The Iron Law\r\n\r\n```\r\nNO PRODUCTION CODE WITHOUT A FAILING TEST FIRST\r\n```\r\n\r\nWrite code before the test? Delete it. Start over.\r\n\r\n**No exceptions:**\r\n- Don\u0027t keep it as \"reference\"\r\n- Don\u0027t \"adapt\" it while writing tests\r\n- Don\u0027t look at it\r\n- Delete means delete\r\n\r\nImplement fresh from tests. Period.\r\n\r\n## Red-Green-Refactor\r\n\r\n```dot\r\ndigraph tdd_cycle {\r\n    rankdir=LR;\r\n    red [label=\"RED\\nWrite failing test\", shape=box, style=filled, fillcolor=\"#ffcccc\"];\r\n    verify_red [label=\"Verify fails\\ncorrectly\", shape=diamond];\r\n    green [label=\"GREEN\\nMinimal code\", shape=box, style=filled, fillcolor=\"#ccffcc\"];\r\n    verify_green [label=\"Verify passes\\nAll green\", shape=diamond];\r\n    refactor [label=\"REFACTOR\\nClean up\", shape=box, style=filled, fillcolor=\"#ccccff\"];\r\n    next [label=\"Next\", shape=ellipse];\r\n\r\n    red -\u003e verify_red;\r\n    verify_red -\u003e green [label=\"yes\"];\r\n    verify_red -\u003e red [label=\"wrong\\nfailure\"];\r\n    green -\u003e verify_green;\r\n    verify_green -\u003e refactor [label=\"yes\"];\r\n    verify_green -\u003e green [label=\"no\"];\r\n    refactor -\u003e verify_green [label=\"stay\\ngreen\"];\r\n    verify_green -\u003e next;\r\n    next -\u003e red;\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### RED - Write Failing Test\r\n\r\nWrite one minimal test showing what should happen.\r\n\r\n\u003cGood\u003e\r\n```typescript\r\ntest(\u0027retries failed operations 3 times\u0027, async () =\u003e {\r\n  let attempts = 0;\r\n  const operation = () =\u003e {\r\n    attempts++;\r\n    if (attempts \u003c 3) throw new Error(\u0027fail\u0027);\r\n    return \u0027success\u0027;\r\n  };\r\n\r\n  const result = await retryOperation(operation);\r\n\r\n  expect(result).toBe(\u0027success\u0027);\r\n  expect(attempts).toBe(3);\r\n});\r\n```\r\nClear name, tests real behavior, one thing\r\n\u003c/Good\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cBad\u003e\r\n```typescript\r\ntest(\u0027retry works\u0027, async () =\u003e {\r\n  const mock = jest.fn()\r\n    .mockRejectedValueOnce(new Error())\r\n    .mockRejectedValueOnce(new Error())\r\n    .mockResolvedValueOnce(\u0027success\u0027);\r\n  await retryOperation(mock);\r\n  expect(mock).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(3);\r\n});\r\n```\r\nVague name, tests mock not code\r\n\u003c/Bad\u003e\r\n\r\n**Requirements:**\r\n- One behavior\r\n- Clear name\r\n- Real code (no mocks unless unavoidable)\r\n\r\n### Verify RED - Watch It Fail\r\n\r\n**MANDATORY. Never skip.**\r\n\r\n```bash\r\nnpm test path/to/test.test.ts\r\n```\r\n\r\nConfirm:\r\n- Test fails (not errors)\r\n- Failure message is expected\r\n- Fails because feature missing (not typos)\r\n\r\n**Test passes?** You\u0027re testing existing behavior. Fix test.\r\n\r\n**Test errors?** Fix error, re-run until it fails correctly.\r\n\r\n### GREEN - Minimal Code\r\n\r\nWrite simplest code to pass the test.\r\n\r\n\u003cGood\u003e\r\n```typescript\r\nasync function retryOperation\u003cT\u003e(fn: () =\u003e Promise\u003cT\u003e): Promise\u003cT\u003e {\r\n  for (let i = 0; i \u003c 3; i++) {\r\n    try {\r\n      return await fn();\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      if (i === 2) throw e;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n  throw new Error(\u0027unreachable\u0027);\r\n}\r\n```\r\nJust enough to pass\r\n\u003c/Good\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cBad\u003e\r\n```typescript\r\nasync function retryOperation\u003cT\u003e(\r\n  fn: () =\u003e Promise\u003cT\u003e,\r\n  options?: {\r\n    maxRetries?: number;\r\n    backoff?: \u0027linear\u0027 | \u0027exponential\u0027;\r\n    onRetry?: (attempt: number) =\u003e void;\r\n  }\r\n): Promise\u003cT\u003e {\r\n  // YAGNI\r\n}\r\n```\r\nOver-engineered\r\n\u003c/Bad\u003e\r\n\r\nDon\u0027t add features, refactor other code, or \"improve\" beyond the test.\r\n\r\n### Verify GREEN - Watch It Pass\r\n\r\n**MANDATORY.**\r\n\r\n```bash\r\nnpm test path/to/test.test.ts\r\n```\r\n\r\nConfirm:\r\n- Test passes\r\n- Other tests still pass\r\n- Output pristine (no errors, warnings)\r\n\r\n**Test fails?** Fix code, not test.\r\n\r\n**Other tests fail?** Fix now.\r\n\r\n### REFACTOR - Clean Up\r\n\r\nAfter green only:\r\n- Remove duplication\r\n- Improve names\r\n- Extract helpers\r\n\r\nKeep tests green. Don\u0027t add behavior.\r\n\r\n### Repeat\r\n\r\nNext failing test for next feature.\r\n\r\n## Good Tests\r\n\r\n| Quality | Good | Bad |\r\n|---------|------|-----|\r\n| **Minimal** | One thing. \"and\" in name? Split it. | `test(\u0027validates email and domain and whitespace\u0027)` |\r\n| **Clear** | Name describes behavior | `test(\u0027test1\u0027)` |\r\n| **Shows intent** | Demonstrates desired API | Obscures what code should do |\r\n\r\n## Why Order Matters\r\n\r\n**\"I\u0027ll write tests after to verify it works\"**\r\n\r\nTests written after code pass immediately. Passing immediately proves nothing:\r\n- Might test wrong thing\r\n- Might test implementation, not behavior\r\n- Might miss edge cases you forgot\r\n- You never saw it catch the bug\r\n\r\nTest-first forces you to see the test fail, proving it actually tests something.\r\n\r\n**\"I already manually tested all the edge cases\"**\r\n\r\nManual testing is ad-hoc. You think you tested everything but:\r\n- No record of what you tested\r\n- Can\u0027t re-run when code changes\r\n- Easy to forget cases under pressure\r\n- \"It worked when I tried it\" ≠ comprehensive\r\n\r\nAutomated tests are systematic. They run the same way every time.\r\n\r\n**\"Deleting X hours of work is wasteful\"**\r\n\r\nSunk cost fallacy. The time is already gone. Your choice now:\r\n- Delete and rewrite with TDD (X more hours, high confidence)\r\n- Keep it and add tests after (30 min, low confidence, likely bugs)\r\n\r\nThe \"waste\" is keeping code you can\u0027t trust. Working code without real tests is technical debt.\r\n\r\n**\"TDD is dogmatic, being pragmatic means adapting\"**\r\n\r\nTDD IS pragmatic:\r\n- Finds bugs before commit (faster than debugging after)\r\n- Prevents regressions (tests catch breaks immediately)\r\n- Documents behavior (tests show how to use code)\r\n- Enables refactoring (change freely, tests catch breaks)\r\n\r\n\"Pragmatic\" shortcuts = debugging in production = slower.\r\n\r\n**\"Tests after achieve the same goals - it\u0027s spirit not ritual\"**\r\n\r\nNo. Tests-after answer \"What does this do?\" Tests-first answer \"What should this do?\"\r\n\r\nTests-after are biased by your implementation. You test what you built, not what\u0027s required. You verify remembered edge cases, not discovered ones.\r\n\r\nTests-first force edge case discovery before implementing. Tests-after verify you remembered everything (you didn\u0027t).\r\n\r\n30 minutes of tests after ≠ TDD. You get coverage, lose proof tests work.\r\n\r\n## Common Rationalizations\r\n\r\n| Excuse | Reality |\r\n|--------|---------|\r\n| \"Too simple to test\" | Simple code breaks. Test takes 30 seconds. |\r\n| \"I\u0027ll test after\" | Tests passing immediately prove nothing. |\r\n| \"Tests after achieve same goals\" | Tests-after = \"what does this do?\" Tests-first = \"what should this do?\" |\r\n| \"Already manually tested\" | Ad-hoc ≠ systematic. No record, can\u0027t re-run. |\r\n| \"Deleting X hours is wasteful\" | Sunk cost fallacy. Keeping unverified code is technical debt. |\r\n| \"Keep as reference, write tests first\" | You\u0027ll adapt it. That\u0027s testing after. Delete means delete. |\r\n| \"Need to explore first\" | Fine. Throw away exploration, start with TDD. |\r\n| \"Test hard = design unclear\" | Listen to test. Hard to test = hard to use. |\r\n| \"TDD will slow me down\" | TDD faster than debugging. Pragmatic = test-first. |\r\n| \"Manual test faster\" | Manual doesn\u0027t prove edge cases. processes/                # 工作流、业务流、操作步骤\n  archive/                  # 过时或低置信条目\n```\n\n跨项目团队知识库暂不直接耦合到 runtime。后续如引入独立 Git 知识仓库，应通过同步任务把稳定条目提升出去，而不是让 driver 直接依赖外部仓库可用性。\n\n可选团队知识库建议使用独立 Git Verification Before Completion\r\n\r\n## Overview\r\n\r\nClaiming work is complete without verification is dishonesty, not efficiency.\r\n\r\n**Core principle:** Evidence before claims, always.\r\n\r\n**Violating the letter of this rule is violating the spirit of this rule.**\r\n\r\n## The Iron Law\r\n\r\n```\r\nNO COMPLETION CLAIMS WITHOUT FRESH VERIFICATION EVIDENCE\r\n```\r\n\r\nIf you haven\u0027t run the verification command in this message, you cannot claim it passes.\r\n\r\n## The Gate Function\r\n\r\n```\r\nBEFORE claiming any status or expressing satisfaction:\r\n\r\n1. IDENTIFY: What command proves this claim?\r\n2. RUN: Execute the FULL command (fresh, complete)\r\n3. READ: Full output, check exit code, count failures\r\n4. VERIFY: Does output confirm the claim?\r\n   - If NO: State actual status with evidence\r\n   - If YES: State claim WITH evidence\r\n5. ONLY THEN: Make the claim\r\n\r\nSkip any step = lying, not verifying\r\n```\r\n\r\n## Common Failures\r\n\r\n| Claim | Requires | Not Sufficient |\r\n|-------|----------|----------------|\r\n| Tests pass | Test command output: 0 failures | Previous run, \"should pass\" |\r\n| Linter clean | Linter output: 0 errors | Partial check, extrapolation |\r\n| Build succeeds | Build command: exit 0 | Linter passing, logs look good |\r\n| Bug fixed | Test original symptom: passes | Code changed, assumed fixed |\r\n| Regression test works | Red-green cycle verified | Test passes once |\r\n| Agent completed | VCS diff shows changes | Agent reports \"success\" |\r\n| Requirements met | Line-by-line checklist | Tests passing |\r\n\r\n## Red Flags - STOP\r\n\r\n- Using \"should\", \"probably\", \"seems to\"\r\n- Expressing satisfaction before verification (\"Great!\", \"Perfect!\", \"Done!\", etc.)\r\n- About to commit/push/PR without verification\r\n- Trusting agent success reports\r\n- Relying on partial verification\r\n- Thinking \"just this once\"\r\n- Tired and wanting work over\r\n- **ANY wording implying success without having run verification**\r\n\r\n## Rationalization Prevention\r\n\r\n| Excuse | Reality |\r\n|--------|---------|\r\n| \"Should work now\" | RUN the verification |\r\n| \"I\u0027m confident\" | Confidence ≠ evidence |\r\n| \"Just this once\" | No exceptions |\r\n| \"Linter passed\" | Linter ≠ compiler |\r\n| \"Agent said success\" | Verify independently |\r\n| \"I\u0027m tired\" | Exhaustion ≠ excuse |\r\n| \"Partial check is enough\" | Partial proves nothing |\r\n| \"Different words so rule doesn\u0027t apply\" | Spirit over letter |\r\n\r\n## Key Patterns\r\n\r\n**Tests:**\r\n```\r\n✅ [Run test command] [See: 34/34 pass] \"All tests pass\"\r\n❌ \"Should pass now\" / \"Looks correct\"\r\n```\r\n\r\n**Regression tests (TDD Red-Green):**\r\n```\r\n✅ Write → Run (pass) → Revert fix → Run (MUST FAIL) → Restore → Run (pass)\r\n❌ \"I\u0027ve written a regression test\" (without red-green verification)\r\n```\r\n\r\n**Build:**\r\n```\r\n✅ [Run build] [See: exit 0] \"Build passes\"\r\n❌ \"Linter passed\" (linter doesn\u0027t check compilation)\r\n```\r\n\r\n**Requirements:**\r\n```\r\n✅ Re-read plan → Create checklist → Verify each → Report gaps or completion\r\n❌ \"Tests pass, phase complete\"\r\n```\r\n\r\n**Agent delegation:**\r\n```\r\n✅ Agent reports success → Check VCS diff → Verify changes → Report actual state\r\n❌ Trust agent report\r\n```\r\n\r\n## Why This Matters\r\n\r\nFrom 24 failure memories:\r\n- your human partner said \"I don\u0027t believe you\" - trust broken\r\n- Undefined functions shipped - would crash\r\n- Missing requirements shipped - incomplete features\r\n- Time wasted on false completion → redirect → rework\r\n- Violates: \"Honesty is a core value. If you lie, you\u0027ll be replaced.\"\r\n\r\n## When To Apply\r\n\r\n**ALWAYS before:**\r\n- ANY variation of success/completion claims\r\n- ANY expression of satisfaction\r\n- ANY positive statement about work state\r\n- Committing, PR creation, task completion\r\n- Moving to next task\r\n- Delegating to agents\r\n\r\n**Rule applies to:**\r\n- Exact phrases\r\n- Paraphrases and synonyms\r\n- Implications of success\r\n- ANY communication suggesting completion/correctness\r\n\r\n## The Bottom Line\r\n\r\n**No shortcuts for verification.**\r\n\r\nRun the command. ] 文档更新\r\n\r\n## 关联 Issue\r\nCloses #123\r\n\r\n## 测试说明\r\n- [ ] 单元测试通过\r\n- [ ] 集成测试通过\r\n- [ ] 手动测试通过\r\n\r\n## 截图（如适用）\r\nUI 变更请附截图\r\n\r\n## 检查清单\r\n- [ ] 代码符合项目规范\r\n- [ ] 已添加必要的测试\r\n- [ ] 已更新相关文档\r\n- [ ] 无敏感信息泄露\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 代码审查清单\r\n\r\n### 功能正确性\r\n- [ ] 代码实现了预期功能\r\n- [ ] 边界条件处理正确\r\n- [ ] 错误处理完善\r\n- [ ] 无明显的逻辑漏洞\r\n\r\n### 代码质量\r\n- [ ] 命名清晰有意义\r\n- [ ] 函数职责单一\r\n- [ ] 无重复代码\r\n- [ ] 复杂逻辑有注释\r\n- [ ] 无硬编码的魔法数字\r\n\r\n### 安全性\r\n- [ ] 输入验证完整\r\n- [ ] 无 SQL 注入风险\r\n- [ ] 无 XSS 风险\r\n- [ ] 敏感信息已脱敏\r\n- [ ] 权限检查到位\r\n\r\n### 性能\r\n- [ ] 无 N+1 查询\r\n- [ ] 无不必要的循环\r\n- [ ] 大数据量有分页\r\n- [ ] 耗时操作有缓存或异步\r\n\r\n### 可维护性\r\n- [ ] 代码结构清晰\r\n- [ ] 依赖关系合理\r\n- [ ] 易于测试\r\n- [ ] 易于扩展\r\n\r\n## 审查反馈规范\r\n\r\n### 评论分类\r\n```\r\n[必须] 必须修改才能合并\r\n[建议] 建议修改，可讨论\r\n[疑问] 需要解释或讨论\r\n[赞] 写得好的地方\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 反馈示例\r\n```\r\n[必须] 这里存在 SQL 注入风险，请使用参数化查询\r\n\r\n[建议] 这个函数超过 50 行，建议拆分为更小的函数\r\n\r\n[疑问] 为什么这里用 setTimeout 而不是 debounce？\r\n\r\n[赞] 这个抽象设计得很好，复用性强\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 审查流程\r\n\r\n```\r\n┌─────────────┐\r\n│  提交 PR    │\r\n└──────┬──────┘\r\n       ▼\r\n┌─────────────┐\r\n│  CI 检查    │ ← 自动化测试、lint、构建\r\n└──────┬──────┘\r\n `contracts/api/`、`contracts/query/` | `configSnapshotDigest`、`datasourceCode`、`queryTemplateVersion`、`parameterSchemaDigest`、`fieldMappingDigest`、`maskingPolicyDigest` |\r\n| DB 抢锁 | `contracts/scheduler/` | `lockOwner`、`lockExpireAt`、`leaseRenewedAt`、数据库时间、5 分钟默认租约 |\r\n| 执行尝试 | `contracts/api/`、`contracts/scheduler/`、`contracts/audit/` | `attemptNo`、FAILED 重试递增、锁接管不递增、同任务同一时刻一个活跃尝试 |\r\n| 批次检查点 | `contracts/scheduler/`、`contracts/query/` | `lastCursor`、`processedCount`、`filePartNo`、`attemptNo`、`retryCount`、`backoffMs` |\r\n| 认证上下文 | `contracts/api/`、`contracts/query/` | `operatorId`、`tenantId`、`roleCodes`、`orgScope`、`requestId`，并叠加数据范围约束 |\r\n| 文件发布 | `contracts/file/` | `tempStorageKey`、`publishedStorageKey`、`checksum`、`checksumAlgorithm`、`checksumVerifiedAt`、`publishedAt`、`deliveryReadyAt` |\r\n| 清理顺序 | `contracts/file/` | 先标记不可下载，再删除对象；失败保留可重试记录 |\r\n| 审计链路 | `contracts/audit/` | `taskId`、`taskCode`、`subsystemCode`、`operatorId`、`action`、`result`、`errorCode`、`requestId`、发生时间 |\r\n| 采购订单样板 | `contracts/sample/`、`contracts/query/`、`contracts/file/` | `taskCode=purchase-order-export`、`subsystemCode=purchase`、`cursorField=orderId`、敏感字段脱敏、`0/1/20000/20001/100000/100001` 行边界 |\r\n\r\n## 3.2 后续 owned paths 依据\r\n\r\n`contracts/README.md` 是当前已存在的契约入口。后续任务创建新文件时，应按能力分区声明 owned paths：\r\n\r\n- 对外 API：`contracts/openapi.yaml`、`contracts/api/`\r\n- 调度锁与执行尝试：`contracts/scheduler/`\r\n- 集中查询、参数 schema、字段映射和脱敏：`contracts/query/`\r\n- 文件临时对象、发布、下载和清理前置标记：`contracts/file/`\r\n- 审计动作和阶段事件：`contracts/audit/`\r\n- 采购订单样板合同：`contracts/sample/`\r\n\r\n实现层和测试层的真实路径由 `plans/features/export-platform.dev-plan.md` 继续约束：契约先行，其次 `tests/contract/`、`tests/backend/`、`tests/scheduler/`、`tests/query/`、`tests/file/`、`tests/sample/`，最后才创建对应 `src/*` 模块。\r\n\r\n## 3.3 CONTRACT-001 已落地契约\r\n\r\n`contracts/openapi.yaml` 是当前统一导出平台的对外 API 和错误码锚点，覆盖 `FR-001`、`FR-002`、`FR-003`、`FR-004`、`FR-007`、`FR-008`、`FR-009`、`FR-010`、`FR-012`、`FR-013`。\r\n\r\n| 接口 | 方法 | 覆盖需求 | 关键契约 |\r\n| --- | --- | --- | --- |\r\n| `/api/export/tasks` | `POST` | FR-001 / FR-009 / FR-013 | 创建任务、最小认证上下文、`clientRequestId` 幂等、成功响应 `idempotencyScope`、`requestDigest`、`configSnapshotDigest` |\r\n| `/api/export/tasks` | `GET` | FR-004 / FR-009 / FR-010 | URL、stream 元信息、文件校验、过期与权限失败 |\r\n| `/api/export/tasks/{taskId}/cancel` | `POST` | FR-012 / FR-010 | PENDING 取消、EXECUTING 批次边界取消；不暴露内部取消状态 |\r\n| `/api/export/tasks/{taskId}/retry` | `POST` | FR-012 / `/api/export/registries/{taskCode}` | `GET` / `PUT` | FR-007 / FR-008 / FR-013 | 配置详情、更新与新任务快照口径 |\r\n| `/api/export/registries/{taskCode}/enable` | `POST` | FR-007 | 启用注册配置 |\r\n| `/api/export/registries/{taskCode}/disable` | `POST` | FR-007 | 禁用注册配置，创建阶段返回 `TASK_DISABLED` |\r\n\r\n## 3.4 对外状态和错误码\r\n\r\n对外任务状态只能使用 `PENDING`、`EXECUTING`、`COMPLETED`、`FAILED`、`CANCELED`、`EXPIRED`。执行中取消意图只能通过动作响应字段表达，不得作为任务状态返回。\r\n\r\n| 错误码 | 默认 HTTP 状态 | 场景 |\r\n| --- | --- | --- |\r\n| `VALIDATION_ERROR` | 400 | 参数校验失败 |\r\n| `AUTH_CONTEXT_MISSING` | 401 | 缺少 `operatorId`、`tenantId`、`roleCodes`、`orgScope` 或 `requestId` |\r\n| `PERMISSION_DENIED` | 403 | 创建、查询、下载或配置操作无权限 |\r\n| `TASK_NOT_FOUND` | 404 | 任务不存在或对当前用户不可见 |\r\n| `TASK_NOT_REGISTERED` | 404 | `taskCode` 未注册 |\r\n| `TASK_DISABLED` | 400 | `taskCode` 已禁用 |\r\n| `QUERY_PARAMS_TOO_LARGE` | 400 | `queryParams` 超过 32KB 默认限制 |\r\n| `IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT` | 409 | 相同幂等范围但参数摘要不同 |\r\n| `INVALID_TASK_STATE` | 400 | 当前状态不允许下载、取消或重试 |\r\n| `ACTIVE_ATTEMPT_CONFLICT` | 409 | 已存在活跃执行尝试 |\r\n| `FILE_EXPIRED` | 410 | 文件已过期或已标记不可下载 |\r\n| `FILE_NOT_READY` | 400 | 文件未发布或任务尚未完成 |\r\n| `FILE_VERIFY_ERROR` | 500 | OSS 上传、元信息或校验失败 |\r\n| `QUERY_TEMPLATE_INVALID` | 500 | 查询模板不存在、不合法或与快照冲突 |\r\n| `DATASOURCE_UNAVAILABLE` | 500 | 数据源或凭证不可用 |\r\n| `QUERY_EXECUTION_ERROR` | 500 | 查询执行失败、批次重试耗尽或游标异常 |\r\n| `FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID` | 500 | 字段映射、字段顺序或字段白名单不合法 |\r\n| `MASKING_RULE_ERROR` | 500 | 脱敏策略配置或执行失败 |\r\n| `EXPORT_RENDER_ERROR` | 500 | XLSX/ZIP 渲染失败 |\r\n| `EXPORT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED` | 400 | 超过默认或配置化最大导出量 |\r\n| `REGISTRY_CONFLICT` | 409 | 注册 `taskCode` 冲突 |\r\n| `INTERNAL_ERROR` | 500 | 未分类服务端错误 |\r\n\r\n## 3.5 CONTRACT-REVIEW-001 `openapi.yaml` 只放对外 API 的正式入口和状态/错误码锚点。\r\n2. 分区目录里的契约文件按能力拆分，不把所有场景塞进单个大文件。\r\n3. 每个契约必须能回指到至少一个 Requirement ID 和一个验收入口。\r\n4. API 契约、scheduler 契约、query 契约、file 契约、audit 契约和 sample 契约必须保持同一组术语，尤其是 `attemptNo`、`configSnapshotDigest`、`batchCheckpoint`、`storageKey`、`requestId`。\r\n5. 文件发布契约必须明确临时对象和已发布对象的边界，避免下载接口误暴露未发布对象。\r\n6. query 契约必须明确禁止原始 SQL，只允许参数化模板和参数 schema 绑定。\r\n7. scheduler 契约必须明确数据库时间、锁租约和接管规则，不允许依赖本机时间。\r\n\r\n## 5. 文件命名建议\r\n\r\n| 类型 | 命名建议 | 示例 |\r\n| --- | --- | --- |\r\n| API 契约 | `*.openapi.yaml` 或 `*.md` | `contracts/api/export-tasks.openapi.yaml` |\r\n| Scheduler 契约 | `*.md` | `contracts/scheduler/lease-and-lock.md` |\r\n| Query 契约 | `*.md` 或 `*.schema.json` | `contracts/query/template-and-mapping.md` |\r\n| File 契约 | `*.md` | `contracts/file/publish-and-download.md` |\r\n| Audit 契约 | `*.md` | `contracts/audit/task-events.md` |\r\n| Sample 契约 | `*.md` | `contracts/sample/purchase-order-export.md` |\r\n\r\n## 6. 使用顺序\r\n\r\n1. 先补 `contracts/openapi.yaml`，锚定对外 API。\r\n2. 再按 `api/`、`scheduler/`、`query/`、`file/`、`audit/`、`sample/` 分区补齐契约说明。\r\n3. 契约定稿后，测试目录按同名能力分区创建，保证测试层和契约层可一一对应。\r\n\r\n## 6.1 验证入口\r\n\r\n当前任务的最小验证命令为：\r\n\r\n```powershell\r\ngit diff --check -- contracts docs/testing/verify-matrix.md\r\nnpx --yes @redocly/cli@1.34.5 lint contracts/openapi.yaml\r\n```\r\n\r\n后续创建 Node 或契约测试工程后，应把 OpenAPI 校验固化为 package script，例如：\r\n\r\n```powershell\r\npowershell -NoProfile -Command \"npm run test:contract\"\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 7. migration 证据。\n\n succeeded in 800ms:\n# Architecture Constraints Packet：统一导出平台\r\n\r\n本文件是统一导出平台进入计划和编码前的架构约束包。后续 `task.json` 中所有 `feature_impl` 任务必须复制本文件中的约束到 `architecture_constraints`，并把最容易跑偏的替代实现写入 `forbidden_implementations`。\r\n\r\n## 1. System Shape\r\n\r\n- 交付形态：`independent_microservice`。\r\n- 运行方式：`http_service` + `worker` + `scheduled_job`。\r\n- 部署单位：独立服务进程；后续实现必须提供生产启动入口和部署入口。\r\n- 生产入口最低要求：HTTP server entry、scheduler worker entry、cleanup job entry、配置加载入口。\r\n- 当前状态：仓库保留产品、契约、架构和测试文档；不保留任何已完成的业务实现、测试证据或旧运行 trace。\r\n\r\n## 2. API Boundary\r\n\r\n- 外部入口：HTTP，契约来源为 `contracts/openapi.yaml`。\r\n- 子系统接入：仅通过 HTTP/Feign 调用统一导出平台，不加载业务 JAR，不直接写平台表。\r\n- Public operation 完成条件：每个公开 operation 必须能追踪到 route/handler、service、repository 或外部 adapter、测试和证据路径。\r\n- 禁止状态：只有 service class、领域函数或单元测试时，不得声明 API 需求完成。\r\n\r\n## 3. Data Boundary\r\n\r\n- 持久化：生产路径使用 MySQL 或等价关系型数据库；任务、注册配置、锁租约、批次检查点、文件元信息、审计日志都必须有 schema/migration。\r\n- Repository 策略：生产 repository 必须走真实持久化边界；`InMemory*`、mock repository、fixture repository 只能用于单元测试。\r\n- 数据访问：平台只允许访问注册配置声明的只读数据源或数据中台，禁止执行调用方传入的原始 SQL。\r\n- 数据一致性：幂等键、配置快照、任务状态机、DB 锁租约和审计写入必须有可验证约束。\r\n\r\n## 4. Async And Worker Boundary\r\n\r\n- 调度方式：MySQL 轮询 + DB 抢锁。\r\n- 锁模型：`lockOwner + lockExpireAt + leaseRenewedAt`，时间判断以数据库时间为准。\r\n- 默认租约：5 分钟，worker 只能在批次边界续租。\r\n- 接管规则：租约过期后的实例接管延续当前 `attemptNo`，从最近持久化批次检查点继续。\r\n- 重试规则：只有 FAILED 重试递增 `attemptNo`；PENDING/EXECUTING 重试必须拒绝。\r\n\r\n## 5. Test Double Policy\r\n\r\n- `InMemory*` 允许范围：unit tests only。\r\n- Mock 允许范围：外部依赖不可用时可作为临时单测替身，但不能作为验收证据。\r\n- 生产完成证据：必须包含 API/handler 测试、DB repository 或 migration 验证、worker/lease 验证、`git diff --check`。\r\n- 若真实 MySQL、对象存储或第三方依赖不可用，任务必须记录 `BLOCKED - 需要人工介入`，不得用内存实现冒充通过。\r\n\r\n## 6. Forbidden Implementations\r\n\r\n- 禁止把 `InMemory*`、mock、fixture repository 或领域原型作为生产实现完成。\r\n- 禁止只有 `src/*/service.ts` 而没有 HTTP route/handler、server entry 和 API 集成测试。\r\n- 禁止只有调度 class 而没有 worker entry、DB 锁 schema、repository 原子抢锁和租约测试。\r\n- 禁止只有 OpenAPI 契约或文档而声明 `feature_impl` 完成。\r\n- 禁止只运行 `git diff --check` 就声明 `feature_impl` 完成。\r\n- 禁止把采购订单样板写成平台特例接口；样板必须复用标准 registry、query、file、audit 链路。\r\n\r\n## 7. Architecture Fitness Checks\r\n\r\n后续脚手架任务必须创建 `arch:check` 或等价命令。最低检查项：\r\n\r\n- 生产 HTTP server entry 存在。\r\n- scheduler worker entry 和 cleanup job entry 存在。\r\n- `contracts/openapi.yaml` 的公开 operation 有 route/handler 和测试映射。\r\n- 生产入口没有引用 `InMemory*`、mock repository 或测试 fixture。\r\n- MySQL schema/migration 覆盖 task、registry、lease/checkpoint、file metadata、audit log。\r\n- `feature_impl` 任务的 `test_command` 包含架构检查、affected tests 和 `git diff --check`。\r\n\r\n## 8. docs\context\architecture-brief.md:191:配置变更只影响新任务；已创建任务、锁接管和 FAILED 重试都沿用创建时快照。快照与查询模板或字段映射冲突时，按 `QUERY_TEMPLATE_INVALID` 或 `FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID` 收口，不得静默放宽字段范围、格式或阈值。
docs\context\architecture-brief.md:200:- 只有用户或系统对 `FAILED` 任务发起重试时才递增 `attemptNo`。
docs\context\architecture-brief.md:220:所有关键动作必须写入审计日志：`CREATE`、`DISPATCH`、`EXECUTE_START`、`EXECUTE_SUCCESS`、`EXECUTE_FAILED`、`CANCEL_REQUEST`、`CANCEL_DONE`、`RETRY_REQUEST`、`DOWNLOAD`、`EXPIRE_MARK`、`CLEANUP_FAILED`。审计字段至少包含 `taskId`、`taskCode`、`subsystemCode`、`operatorId`、`action`、`result`、`errorCode`、`requestId` 和发生时间。

docs\product\prd-lite.md:32:- 平台正式对外任务状态限定为 `PENDING`、`EXECUTING`、`COMPLETED`、`FAILED`、`CANCELED`、`EXPIRED`。
docs\product\prd-lite.md:42:- 锁租约过期后的实例接管延续当前 `attemptNo`，并记录接管审计；只有用户或系统发起 FAILED 重试时才递增 `attemptNo`。
docs\product\prd-lite.md:78:| FR-004 | 查询任务历史 | P0 |
docs\product\prd-lite.md:98:- PENDING 可取消；FAILED 可重试；COMPLETED、CANCELED、EXPIRED 不允许直接重试为同一任务。
docs\product\prd-lite.md:99:- FAILED 任务重试必须保留原 `taskId` 的审计链路并递增执行尝试次数；同一任务同一时刻只能有一个活跃执行尝试。
docs\product\prd-lite.md:112:- 审计动作至少覆盖 `CREATE`、`DISPATCH`、`EXECUTE_START`、`EXECUTE_SUCCESS`、`EXECUTE_FAILED`、`CANCEL_REQUEST`、`CANCEL_DONE`、`RETRY_REQUEST`、`DOWNLOAD`、`EXPIRE_MARK`、`CLEANUP_FAILED`。
docs\product\prd-lite.md:134:- 执行阶段失败统一映射到 `FAILED` 和明确错误码，例如 `QUERY_TEMPLATE_INVALID`、`DATASOURCE_UNAVAILABLE`、`QUERY_EXECUTION_ERROR`、`FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID`、`MASKING_RULE_ERROR`、`EXPORT_RENDER_ERROR`。
docs\product\acceptance-criteria.md:12:| AC-004 | FR-004 | 可按 `taskCode`、`status`、`createdBy`、`createdAtRange`、`fileFormat`、`subsystemCode` 分页查询历史任务；普通用户仅看本人任务，管理员按权限看全局。测试文档若出现更细筛选项，必须回填到产品真相源或标记为假设。 | P0 |
docs\product\acceptance-criteria.md:20:| AC-012 | FR-012 | PENDING 可取消，FAILED 可重试；FAILED 重试保留原 `taskId` 审计链路并递增执行尝试次数；EXECUTING 仅通过内部 `cancelRequested=true` 做批次边界收口并最终置为 `CANCELED`，不返回 `cancel_requested` 状态；非法状态返回 `INVALID_TASK_STATE`。 | P1 |
docs\product\acceptance-criteria.md:39:| AC-E005 | OSS 上传失败 | 任务置为 `FAILED`，错误码收口为 `FILE_VERIFY_ERROR`，并记录对象存储写入失败原因和临时对象定位或清理记录。 |
docs\product\acceptance-criteria.md:45:| AC-E011 | 查询模板不存在或不合法 | 任务置为 `FAILED`，错误码为 `QUERY_TEMPLATE_INVALID`。 |
docs\product\acceptance-criteria.md:46:| AC-E012 | 数据源不可用或凭证不可用 | 任务置为 `FAILED`，错误码为 `DATASOURCE_UNAVAILABLE`。 |
docs\product\acceptance-criteria.md:47:| AC-E013 | 查询执行失败 | 按批次重试策略处理；最终失败时任务置为 `FAILED`，错误码为 `QUERY_EXECUTION_ERROR`。 |
docs\product\acceptance-criteria.md:48:| AC-E014 | 字段映射不合法 | 任务置为 `FAILED`，错误码为 `FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID`。 |
docs\product\acceptance-criteria.md:49:| AC-E015 | 非法或重复重试请求 | PENDING/EXECUTING 任务返回非法状态错误且不得派发执行；FAILED 任务同一时刻只能有一个活跃执行尝试。 |
docs\product\acceptance-criteria.md:53:| AC-E019 | DB 锁租约过期 | 其他实例只能在租约过期后重新抢锁；锁接管延续当前 `attemptNo` 并从批次检查点继续，FAILED 重试才递增 `attemptNo`，同时保留原锁持有者证据。 |
docs\product\acceptance-criteria.md:54:| AC-E020 | 查询批次重试耗尽 | 批次按策略重试后仍失败，任务置为 `FAILED`，错误码收口为 `QUERY_EXECUTION_ERROR` 并记录重试次数。 |
docs\product\acceptance-criteria.md:56:| AC-E022 | 采购订单样板敏感字段未脱敏 | 平台拒绝生成或交付文件，任务置为 `FAILED`，错误码为 `MASKING_RULE_ERROR`，并记录脱敏校验失败证据。 |
docs\product\acceptance-criteria.md:57:| AC-E023 | 采购订单样板游标不稳定 | 查询结果缺失游标、重复游标或非递增游标时，任务置为 `FAILED`，错误码收口为 `QUERY_EXECUTION_ERROR`。 |
docs\product\acceptance-criteria.md:58:| AC-E024 | 查询模板或字段映射与任务快照冲突 | 平台不得静默放宽格式、阈值或字段范围；任务置为 `FAILED`，错误码收口为 `QUERY_TEMPLATE_INVALID` 或 `FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID`，并保留冲突证据。 |
docs\product\acceptance-criteria.md:60:| AC-E026 | 文件发布前校验失败 | 文件元信息缺失、校验值不匹配或临时对象发布失败时，不生成下载地址，任务置为 `FAILED`，错误码为 `FILE_VERIFY_ERROR`，并记录临时对象定位或清理记录。 |
docs\product\acceptance-criteria.md:61:| AC-E027 | 文件渲染失败 | XLSX/ZIP 文件渲染失败时，任务置为 `FAILED`，错误码为 `EXPORT_RENDER_ERROR`，并记录渲染输入摘要和失败原因。 |
docs\product\page-inventory.md:29:- 取消与重试接口必须防重复派发：FAILED 重试保留原 `taskId` 审计链路并递增执行尝试次数，PENDING/EXECUTING 重试返回非法状态错误且不得产生新的执行。

Write Failing Test\r\n\r\nWrite one minimal test showing what should happen.\r\n\r\n\u003cGood\u003e\r\n```typescript\r\ntest(\u0027retries failed operations 3 times\u0027, async () =\u003e {\r\n  let attempts = 0;\r\n  const operation = () =\u003e {\r\n    attempts++;\r\n    if (attempts \u003c 3) throw new Error(\u0027fail\u0027);\r\n    return \u0027success\u0027;\r\n  };\r\n\r\n  const result = await retryOperation(operation);\r\n\r\n  expect(result).toBe(\u0027success\u0027);\r\n  expect(attempts).toBe(3);\r\n});\r\n```\r\nClear name, tests real behavior, one thing\r\n\u003c/Good\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cBad\u003e\r\n```typescript\r\ntest(\u0027retry works\u0027, async () =\u003e {\r\n  const mock = jest.fn()\r\n    .mockRejectedValueOnce(new Error())\r\n    .mockRejectedValueOnce(new Error())\r\n    .mockResolvedValueOnce(\u0027success\u0027);\r\n  await retryOperation(mock);\r\n  expect(mock).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(3);\r\n});\r\n```\r\nVague name, tests mock not code\r\n\u003c/Bad\u003e\r\n\r\n**Requirements:**\r\n- One behavior\r\n- Clear name\r\n- Real code (no mocks unless unavoidable)\r\n\r\n### Verify RED - Don\u0027t add behavior.\r\n\r\n### Repeat\r\n\r\nNext failing test for next feature.\r\n\r\n## Good Tests\r\n\r\n| Quality | Good | Bad |\r\n|---------|------|-----|\r\n| **Minimal** | One thing. \"and\" in name? Split it. | `test(\u0027validates email and domain and whitespace\u0027)` |\r\n| **Clear** | Name describes behavior | `test(\u0027test1\u0027)` |\r\n| **Shows intent** | Demonstrates desired API | Obscures what code should do |\r\n\r\n## Why Order Matters\r\n\r\n**\"I\u0027ll write tests after to verify it works\"**\r\n\r\nTests written after code pass immediately. Passing immediately proves nothing:\r\n- Might test wrong thing\r\n- Might test implementation, not behavior\r\n- Might miss edge cases you forgot\r\n- You never saw it catch the bug\r\n\r\nTest-first forces you to see the test fail, proving it actually tests something.\r\n\r\n**\"I already manually tested all the edge cases\"**\r\n\r\nManual testing is ad-hoc. You think you tested everything but:\r\n- No record of what you tested\r\n- Can\u0027t re-run when code changes\r\n- Easy to forget cases under pressure\r\n- \"It worked when I tried it\" ≠ comprehensive\r\n\r\nAutomated tests are systematic. They run the same way every time.\r\n\r\n**\"Deleting X hours of work is wasteful\"**\r\n\r\nSunk cost fallacy. The time is already gone. Your choice now:\r\n- Delete and rewrite with TDD (X more hours, high confidence)\r\n- Keep it and add tests after (30 min, low confidence, likely bugs)\r\n\r\nThe \"waste\" is keeping code you can\u0027t trust. Working code without real tests is technical debt.\r\n\r\n**\"TDD is dogmatic, being pragmatic means adapting\"**\r\n\r\nTDD IS pragmatic:\r\n- Finds bugs before commit (faster than debugging after)\r\n- Prevents regressions (tests catch breaks immediately)\r\n- Documents behavior (tests show how to use code)\r\n- Enables refactoring (change freely, tests catch breaks)\r\n\r\n\"Pragmatic\" shortcuts = debugging in production = slower.\r\n\r\n**\"Tests after achieve the same goals - it\u0027s spirit not ritual\"**\r\n\r\nNo. Tests-after answer \"What does this do?\" Tests-first answer \"What should this do?\"\r\n\r\nTests-after are biased by your implementation. You test what you built, not what\u0027s required. You verify remembered edge cases, not discovered ones.\r\n\r\nTests-first force edge case discovery before implementing. Tests-after verify you remembered everything (you didn\u0027t).\r\n\r\n30 minutes of tests after ≠ TDD. You get coverage, lose proof tests work.\r\n\r\n## Common Rationalizations\r\n\r\n| Excuse | Reality |\r\n|--------|---------|\r\n| \"Too simple to test\" | Simple code breaks. Test takes 30 seconds. |\r\n| \"I\u0027ll test after\" | Tests passing immediately prove nothing. |\r\n| \"Tests after achieve same goals\" | Tests-after = \"what does this do?\" Tests-first = \"what should this do?\" |\r\n| \"Already manually tested\" | Ad-hoc ≠ systematic. No record, can\u0027t re-run. |\r\n| \"Deleting X hours is wasteful\" | Sunk cost fallacy. Keeping unverified code is technical debt. |\r\n| \"Keep as reference, write tests first\" | You\u0027ll adapt it. That\u0027s testing after. Delete means delete. |\r\n| \"Need to explore first\" | Fine. Throw away exploration, start with TDD. |\r\n| \"Test hard = design unclear\" | Listen to test. Hard to test = hard to use. |\r\n| \"TDD will slow me down\" | TDD faster than debugging. Pragmatic = test-first. |\r\n| \"Manual test faster\" | Manual doesn\u0027t prove edge cases. You\u0027ll re-test every change. |\r\n| \"Existing code has no tests\" | You\u0027re improving it. Add tests for existing code. |\r\n\r\n## Red Flags - STOP and Start Over\r\n\r\n- Code before test\r\n- Test after implementation\r\n- Test passes immediately\r\n- Can\u0027t explain why test failed\r\n- Tests added \"later\"\r\n- Rationalizing \"just this once\"\r\n- \"I already manually tested it\"\r\n- \"Tests after achieve the same purpose\"\r\n- \"It\u0027s about spirit not ritual\"\r\n- \"Keep as reference\" or \"adapt existing code\"\r\n- \"Already spent X hours, deleting is wasteful\"\r\n- \"TDD is dogmatic, I\u0027m being pragmatic\"\r\n- \"This is different because...\"\r\n\r\n**All of these mean: Delete code. Start over with TDD.**\r\n\r\n## Example: Bug Fix\r\n\r\n**Bug:** Empty email accepted\r\n\r\n**RED**\r\n```typescript\r\ntest(\u0027rejects empty email\u0027, async () =\u003e {\r\n  const result = await submitForm({ email: \u0027\u0027 });\r\n  expect(result.error).toBe(\u0027Email required\u0027);\r\n});\r\n```\r\n\r\n**Verify RED**\r\n```bash\r\n$ npm test\r\nFAIL: expected \u0027Email required\u0027, got undefined\r\n```\r\n\r\n**GREEN**\r\n```typescript\r\nfunction submitForm(data: FormData) {\r\n  if (!data.email?.trim()) {\r\n    return { error: \u0027Email required\u0027 };\r\n  }\r\n  // ...\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n**Verify GREEN**\r\n```bash\r\n$ npm test\r\nPASS\r\n```\r\n\r\n**REFACTOR**\r\nExtract validation for multiple fields if needed.\r\n\r\n## Verification Checklist\r\n\r\nBefore marking work complete:\r\n\r\n- [ ] Every new function/method has a test\r\n- [ ] Watched each test fail before implementing\r\n- [ ] Each test failed for expected reason (feature missing, not typo)\r\n- [ ] Wrote minimal code to pass each test\r\n- [ ] All tests pass\r\n- [ ] Output pristine (no errors, warnings)\r\n- [ ] Tests use real code (mocks only if unavoidable)\r\n- [ ] Edge cases and errors covered\r\n\r\nCan\u0027t check all boxes? You skipped TDD. Start over.\r\n\r\n## When Stuck\r\n\r\n| Problem | Solution |\r\n|---------|----------|\r\n| Don\u0027t know how to test | Write wished-for API. Write assertion first. Ask your human partner. |\r\n| Test too complicated | Design too complicated. Simplify interface. |\r\n| Must mock everything | Code too coupled. Use dependency injection. |\r\n| Test setup huge | Extract helpers. Still complex? Simplify design. |\r\n\r\n## Debugging Integration\r\n\r\nBug found? Write failing test reproducing it. Follow TDD cycle. Test proves fix and prevents regression.\r\n\r\nNever fix bugs without a test.\r\n\r\n## Testing Anti-Patterns\r\n\r\nWhen adding mocks or test utilities, read @testing-anti-patterns.md to avoid common pitfalls:\r\n- Testing mock behavior instead of real behavior\r\n- Adding test-only methods to production classes\r\n- Mocking without understanding dependencies\r\n\r\n## Final Rule\r\n\r\n```\r\nProduction code → test exists and failed first\r\nOtherwise → not TDD\r\n```\r\n\r\nNo exceptions without your human partner\u0027s permission.\r\n\r\n\n succeeded in 349ms:\n---\r\nname: verification-before-completion\r\ndescription: Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, before committing or creating PRs - requires running verification commands and confirming output before making any success claims; evidence before assertions always\r\n---\r\n\r\n# Verification Before Completion\r\n\r\n## Overview\r\n\r\nClaiming work is complete without verification is dishonesty, not efficiency.\r\n\r\n**Core principle:** Evidence before claims, always.\r\n\r\n**Violating the letter of this rule is violating the spirit of this rule.**\r\n\r\n## The Iron Law\r\n\r\n```\r\nNO COMPLETION CLAIMS WITHOUT FRESH VERIFICATION EVIDENCE\r\n```\r\n\r\nIf you haven\u0027t run the verification command in this message, you cannot claim it passes.\r\n\r\n## The Gate Function\r\n\r\n```\r\nBEFORE claiming any status or expressing satisfaction:\r\n\r\n1. IDENTIFY: What command proves this claim?\r\n2. RUN: Execute the FULL command (fresh, complete)\r\n3. READ: Full output, check exit code, count failures\r\n4. VERIFY: Does output confirm the claim?\r\n   - If NO: State actual status with evidence\r\n   - If YES: State claim WITH evidence\r\n5. ONLY THEN: Make the claim\r\n\r\nSkip any step = lying, not verifying\r\n```\r\n\r\n## Common Failures\r\n\r\n| Claim | Requires | Not Sufficient |\r\n|-------|----------|----------------|\r\n| Tests pass | Test command output: 0 failures | Previous run, \"should pass\" |\r\n| Linter clean | Linter output: 0 errors | Partial check, extrapolation |\r\n| Build succeeds | Build command: exit 0 | Linter passing, logs look good |\r\n| Bug fixed | Test original symptom: passes | Code changed, assumed fixed |\r\n| Regression test works | Red-green cycle verified | Test passes once |\r\n| Agent completed | VCS diff shows changes | Agent reports \"success\" |\r\n| Requirements met | Line-by-line checklist | Tests passing |\r\n\r\n## Red Flags - STOP\r\n\r\n- Using \"should\", \"probably\", \"seems to\"\r\n- Expressing satisfaction before verification (\"Great!\", \"Perfect!\", \"Done!\", etc.)\r\n- About to commit/push/PR without verification\r\n- Trusting agent success reports\r\n- Relying on partial verification\r\n- Thinking \"just this once\"\r\n- Tired and wanting work over\r\n- **ANY wording implying success without having run verification**\r\n\r\n## Rationalization Prevention\r\n\r\n| Excuse | Reality |\r\n|--------|---------|\r\n| \"Should work now\" | RUN the verification |\r\n| \"I\u0027m confident\" | Confidence ≠ evidence |\r\n| \"Just this once\" | No exceptions |\r\n| \"Linter passed\" | Linter ≠ compiler |\r\n| \"Agent said success\" | Verify independently |\r\n| \"I\u0027m

docs\context\architecture-brief.md:72:### 5.3 查询执行与批次检查点
docs\context\architecture-brief.md:75:- 每个批次必须持久化 `lastCursor`、`processedCount`、`filePartNo`、`attemptNo` 和 `retryCount`。

docs\context\architecture-brief.md:120:| 配置漂移 | 任务创建时固化快照，重试沿用快照 |
docs\context\architecture-brief.md:137:4. 再 FR-005 / FR-011 / FR-012，确认调度、清理、取消与重试。
docs\context\architecture-brief.md:155:统一导出平台按独立后端服务建设，对外暴露任务、注册配置、下载、取消和重试 API；对内由调度 worker、查询执行、文件服务、清理 job 和审计链路协作完成异步导出。子系统只通过 HTTP/Feign 提交任务、传递认证上下文和符合注册 schema 的业务查询参数，不向平台注入业务 JAR、原始 SQL 或文件渲染实现。
docs\context\architecture-brief.md:159:| 任务入口 | 创建、幂等、状态机、进度、历史、下载、取消、重试 | 调用 API，传递 `taskCode`、`queryParams`、`clientRequestId` 和认证上下文 | 子系统直接写平台任务表 |
docs\context\architecture-brief.md:162:| 查询与数据范围 | 参数化模板、只读数据源、游标分页、数据范围叠加、批次检查点 | 保证查询条件语义与注册 schema 对齐 | 绕过 `tenantId`、`operatorId`、`roleCodes`、`orgScope` |
docs\context\architecture-brief.md:164:| 审计与清理 | 阶段事件、审计日志、下载日志、过期标记、对象清理重试 | 保留调用侧 requestId | 静默吞掉失败原因 |
docs\context\architecture-brief.md:185:任务创建时必须聚合并持久化三类快照，后续调度、取消、重试、下载和审计均引用同一任务快照：
docs\context\architecture-brief.md:191:配置变更只影响新任务；已创建任务、锁接管和 FAILED 重试都沿用创建时快照。快照与查询模板或字段映射冲突时，按 `QUERY_TEMPLATE_INVALID` 或 `FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID` 收口，不得静默放宽字段范围、格式或阈值。
docs\context\architecture-brief.md:195:调度 worker 采用 `MySQL 轮询 + DB 抢锁`。锁模型统一为 `lockOwner + lockExpireAt + leaseRenewedAt`，时间判断以数据库时间为准。默认租约 5 分钟，worker 只能在批次边界续租。
docs\context\architecture-brief.md:199:- 租约过期后的实例接管延续当前 `attemptNo`，从最近批次检查点继续，并记录接管审计。
docs\context\architecture-brief.md:200:- 只有用户或系统对 `FAILED` 任务发起重试时才递增 `attemptNo`。
docs\context\architecture-brief.md:201:- `PENDING/EXECUTING` 收到重试请求时返回非法状态错误，不得重复派发执行。
docs\context\architecture-brief.md:203:批次检查点至少包含 `lastCursor`、`processedCount`、`filePartNo`、`attemptNo`、`batchSize`、`batchRowCount`、`retryCount` 和 `backoffMs`。查询批次默认 30 秒超时，最多 3 次指数退避；重试耗尽后映射为 `QUERY_EXECUTION_ERROR`。
docs\context\architecture-brief.md:216:对象路径默认为 `exports/{subsystemCode}/{taskCode}/{yyyyMMdd}/{taskId}/{attemptNo}/{fileName}`；校验算法默认 `SHA-256`；签名 URL 默认有效期 10 分钟。清理 job 必须先标记任务或文件引用不可下载，再删除对象；删除失败保留可重试记录和审计。
